basic_details.job_title: SPIC Chandigarh Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for MTS, Clerk-cum-Steno and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Society for Promotion of IT in Chandigarh (SPIC Chandigarh)
basic_details.post_name: Clerk cum Stenographer, Senior Assistant, Section Officer, Multi Tasking Staff (MTS)
basic_details.short_information: Society for Promotion of IT in Chandigarh (SPIC Chandigarh) has officially released the Clerk cum Stenographer, Senior Assistant, Section Officer, and Multi Tasking Staff (MTS) Recruitment 2026 notification for 4 vacancies on a contractual basis. Eligible candidates with qualifications including Graduation in any discipline or Matric Standard or above and aged between 18 to 62 years can apply online before 04 August 2026 through the official SPIC Chandigarh recruitment portal. Selected candidates will be appointed on a contractual basis with a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 24,494 to Rs. 45,9

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 62 years Age relaxation will be as per the rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate or equivalent, Bachelor's degree in any discipline, Graduation in any discipline, Matric Standard or above
qualification.details: Clerk cum Stenographer: Graduate or equivalent from a recognized University. Shorthand speed (80-100 w.p.m.) and typing speed (30 w.p.m.). Senior Assistant: A bachelor's degree in any discipline and proficiency in computer skills like MS Office with typing speed 30 WPA. 05 years of Experience in the field of Clerk/Data Entry Operator and 03-04 years' experience as Senior Assistant in the Govt. Office. Section Officer: Graduation in any discipline or equivalent from a recognized university. 10 years' experience as Section Officer (SAS) or equivalent/above from Central Govt. Ministries/Govt. Departments of State/UT. Should have knowledge of MS Word, Excel, Power Point, Internet and Tally. Multi Tasking Staff (MTS): Matric Standard or above. Some experience in Medical Care/Social Service.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the SPIC Chandigarh Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 04-08-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of SPIC Chandigarh to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download SPIC Chandigarh Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: SPIC Chandigarh Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the SPIC Chandigarh Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download SPIC Chandigarh Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: SPIC Chandigarh Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Clerk cum Stenographer: Graduate or equivalent from a recognized University. Shorthand speed (80-100 w.p.m.) and typing speed (30 w.p.m.). Senior Assistant: A bachelor's degree in any discipline and proficiency in computer skills like MS Office with typing speed 30 WPA. 05 years of Experience in the field of Clerk/Data Entry Operator and 03-04 years' experience as Senior Assistant in the Govt. Office. Section Officer: Graduation in any discipline or equivalent from a recognized university. 10 years' experience as Section Officer (SAS) or equivalent/above from Central Govt. Ministries/Govt. Departments of State/UT. Should have knowledge of MS Word, Excel, Power Point, Internet and Tally. Multi Tasking Staff (MTS): Matric Standard or above. Some experience in Medical Care/Social Service.

content_sections.heading: SPIC Chandigarh Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 62 years Age relaxation will be as per the rules.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the SPIC Chandigarh Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 04-08-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of SPIC Chandigarh to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for SPIC Chandigarh Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the SPIC Chandigarh Recruitment 2026 is 04 August 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies announced for various posts including Clerk cum Stenographer, Senior Assistant, Section Officer, and Multi Tasking Staff (MTS).

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 18 years and the maximum age limit is 62 years for all the posts announced by SPIC Chandigarh.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for General/OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC category candidates is Rs. 500/-.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for SC and ST category candidates is Rs. 500/-.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the SPIC Chandigarh recruitment will involve an Online Test followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q7. What is the starting date for the online application?
faq.answer: The online application process for SPIC Chandigarh Recruitment 2026 starts on 21 July 2026.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary for the Multi Tasking Staff (MTS) post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Multi Tasking Staff (MTS) post is Rs. 24494 per month.

faq.question: Q9. What is the qualification required for the Senior Assistant post?
faq.answer: A Bachelor's degree in any discipline with proficiency in computer skills like MS Office and a typing speed of 30 WPA is required for the Senior Assistant post.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a contractual job?
faq.answer: Yes, the job type for this recruitment is contractual.
